checks.name: studio opening fits mobile viewports
checks.detail: The opening must remain usable on short portrait and landscape screens.

checks.name: studio opening controls meet touch-target minimum
checks.detail: Opening controls must meet the mobile touch-target requirement.

checks.name: mobile More is part of the primary controls
checks.detail: More must share the bottom action bar instead of consuming a separate row.

checks.name: mobile menu actions dismiss the drawer
checks.detail: Level map, Daily Flock, Settings, Journal, and navigation must not remain behind the drawer.

checks.name: mobile layout uses named grid areas
checks.detail: Named areas prevent hidden rows from stretching controls on short screens.

checks.name: portrait action bar has four equal columns
checks.detail: Undo, Hint, Restart, and More should remain in one row.

checks.name: mobile controls meet touch-target minimum
checks.detail: Primary controls should be at least 48px and secondary controls at least 44px.

checks.name: compact landscape has dedicated layout
checks.detail: Landscape must keep the board and controls visible without stretching.

checks.name: level map is contained above the drawer
checks.detail: The map must not remain hidden under More or extend beyond the visual viewport.

checks.name: settings and Journal scroll internally
checks.detail: Long mobile dialogs must not scroll the gameplay page.

checks.name: mobile E2E coverage checks controls
checks.detail: Missing mobile action-bar regression test.

checks.name: mobile E2E coverage checks menu-to-map navigation
checks.detail: Missing regression coverage for the drawer stacking bug.

checks.name: mobile E2E coverage checks touch targets
checks.detail: Missing touch-target regression coverage.

checks.name: mobile E2E coverage checks compact landscape
checks.detail: Missing landscape regression coverage.
